# komodo_deploy_deployment (Action)

Deploys (or redeploys) the container for the target deployment. Pulls the image, stops the existing container, and starts a new one.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `deployment` (String) Id or name of the deployment to deploy.

### Optional

- `stop_signal` (String) Override the default termination signal (e.g. `SIGTERM`, `SIGINT`). Only used when the container must be stopped first.
- `stop_time` (Number) Override the default termination max time (seconds). Only used when the container must be stopped first.
